statement: In every magma, Equation 220 (`x = (y * (x * x)) * z`) implies Equation 1169 (`x = y * ((z * (y * y)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0268
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op x x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op y y)) z))
